The Health Department has intensified surveillance and preventive measures across affected districts.\n\nKerala Rain \u0026 Monsoon Alerts: The IMD reports shifting monsoon patterns with heavy rains continuing across the state; orange alerts have been issued for multiple districts.\n\nCMRL Pay-off Case / ED Raids: The Enforcement Directorate continues its probe into the monthly pay-off case, issuing fresh summons to Veena Vijayan.\n\nMedical College Negligence: A duty doctor was suspended after a severe lapse in patient care where an ICU patient's untreated leg wound was found infested with maggots.\n\nEducation / Exams: The Directorate of Higher Secondary Education (DHSE) has announced the schedule for the Kerala 12th SAY (Save A Year) exams, running from June 29 to July 3.\n\nMathrubhumi News (മലയാളം: മാതൃഭൂമി ന്യൂസ്) is a 24-hour Malayalam television news channel and is one of Kerala's most viewed TV channels.
